hero.subtitle: Gunimi unifies your relationships, deals, tasks, and knowledge into a single workspace — with AI that actually understands your business.
trustSignals: Your data stays in your workspace.
We never train AI on your workspace data.
Your workspace is private by default.
hero.productSentenceLine2: It removes the work that shouldn’t exist.

actI.statement1: Your business already knows things no dashboard has ever shown you.
actI.statement2: It lives in emails, in relationships, in the timing of decisions — patterns that form before anyone notices them.
actI.statement3: Gunimi is the first system built to hold all of it.

actII.beat3: None of them exist in one place.

actIV.beat1: You've already seen how Gunimi thinks.

actIII.beat5: It no longer waits to be asked.

workspacePreview.subtitle: A live view of your entire business — metrics, relationships, tasks, and AI signals — all in one place.

features.subtitle: Everything your business needs. Not as separate apps — as a single intelligent workspace where every module knows about every other module.

trust.subtitle: Built from day one for organizations that require compliance, privacy, and enterprise-grade reliability.

trustPoints.title: Enterprise security
trustPoints.desc: SOC 2 Type II certified. Data encrypted at rest and in transit. Role-based access control across every workspace.

trustPoints.title: Your data stays yours
trustPoints.desc: We never train AI models on your data. Your workspace memory is isolated and only accessible to your team.

trustPoints.title: Built for performance
trustPoints.desc: Sub-100ms response times. Global CDN. Designed to handle enterprise workloads without degradation.

trustPoints.title: Globally available
trustPoints.desc: Multi-region infrastructure. Automatic failover. 99.9% uptime SLA with full incident transparency.

about.headline: The workspace that thinks.
about.subline: Gunimi was built on a single premise: the tools businesses use to manage relationships, knowledge and communication should be as intelligent as the people using them.
about.story0: Most workspace software was designed before AI existed. It was designed around records — rows, columns, statuses. It asks you to fill in fields, maintain pipelines and update boards. It is optimized for the system, not for you.
about.story1Start: Gunimi is designed from a different starting point:
about.story1Emphasis: what if your workspace understood context?
about.story1End: What if it connected the deal to the note to the email to the company? What if it surfaced the right thing before you had to go looking for it?
about.story2: We are building an AI Workspace Operating System — a platform where companies, contacts, deals, tasks, notes and communication exist inside a shared intelligence layer. One system. Full context. Always available.

pillars.title: One workspace
pillars.body: Contacts, deals, notes, tasks, email and intelligence — unified inside a single operating layer. No tab switching. No context loss.

pillars.title: Intelligence first
pillars.body: AI is not an add-on. It runs through every surface: drafting, surfacing signals, connecting the dots across your relationship graph.

pillars.title: Enterprise trust
pillars.body: Workspace isolation, encrypted data at rest and in transit, fine-grained permissions, and audit trails built in from day one.

pillars.title: Built for teams
pillars.body: Multi-workspace architecture supports the way your business is actually structured — not an idealized org chart.

about.quote: "Relationships are the most important asset in any business. We're building the OS to manage them."

contact.headline: Get in touch.
contact.subline: Select a category and we'll route your message to the right team. We aim to respond within one business day.
contact.successMessage: Message sent. We'll be in touch soon.

security.headline: Enterprise-grade
security.subline: Your business data deserves serious protection. Here is exactly how Gunimi secures it — from storage to access to AI processing.

sections.title: Encryption
items: All data encrypted at rest using AES-256
All data encrypted in transit via TLS 1.3
Database credentials and secrets managed via environment-level secrets, never in source code
API keys are never exposed client-side

sections.title: Infrastructure
items: Hosted on Supabase — SOC 2 Type II compliant infrastructure
Data stored in EU regions by default
Automatic backups with point-in-time recovery
Redundant, highly available architecture

sections.title: Workspace isolation
items: Every workspace is strictly isolated at the data layer
Row-level security (RLS) enforced at the database level, not just the application layer
No cross-workspace data access is possible by design
Workspace-scoped permissions for every resource

sections.title: Authentication & access
items: Secure email + password authentication via Supabase Auth
OAuth 2.0 support with server-side state verification
Session tokens are short-lived and rotated automatically
Password reset flows are rate-limited and signed

sections.title: Privacy by design
items: We do not sell or share your data with third parties
Contact and company data is workspace-private
Error monitoring excludes personally identifiable information
Session replay tools are configured with full text masking

sections.title: AI & data access
items: AI features operate only on data within your workspace
Your data is never used to train third-party models
AI prompts and outputs are not stored beyond the session
See our AI Transparency page for full details

sections.title: Responsible disclosure
items: We take security reports seriously and respond within 48 hours
Email security@gunimi.com for responsible disclosure
We do not pursue legal action against good-faith security researchers

aiTransparency.headline: AI that works
aiTransparency.subline: We believe you have a right to know exactly what our AI can access, what it cannot do, and how your data is handled.
can: Read workspace data (contacts, companies, deals, notes, tasks) that you explicitly share in a prompt
Generate drafts, summaries and suggestions based on that data
Surface related records from your workspace when relevant
Help you compose emails, notes and action items
cannot: Access other workspaces or data that belongs to other organizations
Modify records without explicit user confirmation
Access external URLs, websites or APIs on your behalf
See data from workspaces you are not a member of
Remember previous conversations across separate sessions

principles.title: Your data is not training data
principles.body: Content you create in Gunimi — contacts, deals, notes, messages — is never used to train AI models, ours or anyone else's. Your business data is yours.

principles.title: Workspace-scoped context only
principles.body: AI features only operate on data within your active workspace. There is no cross-workspace AI context — ever.

principles.title: Human confirmation for writes
principles.body: AI can draft and suggest, but it cannot modify, create or delete records without an explicit action from a human. Every write is intentional.

principles.title: Hallucinations are real
principles.body: AI can and does generate incorrect information. Treat AI output as a draft, not a source of truth. Always verify important facts from primary sources.

principles.title: Prompts are not stored
principles.body: Your prompts and AI responses are not stored in our database beyond the current session. They are not accessible to other users or team members.

principles.title: Third-party models
principles.body: Gunimi uses third-party AI model providers to power intelligence features. We have data processing agreements in place that prohibit use of your data for model training.

aiTransparency.warningBody: AI-generated content in Gunimi is a starting point, not an authoritative record. Always verify critical business information against primary sources. The responsibility for decisions made using AI-assisted information remains with the human making that decision.

changelog.headline: What's new.
changelog.subline: Every update, improvement and fix — in one place.

releases.title: Workspace Intelligence
releases.description: The AI layer is now available across the entire workspace. Gunimi Intelligence can surface related records, draft communication, and summarise deal history in context.

changes.text: Gunimi Intelligence panel — AI assistant scoped to your workspace
Deal summary: AI-generated brief from notes, tasks and emails
Analytics dashboard with real-time pipeline metrics
Multi-workspace switching — instant transitions with state preservation
Workspace shell redesigned: Deep Space atmosphere, cinematic headings
Row-level security reinforced across all resource types

releases.title: Pipeline & Deals
releases.description: Full deal pipeline with stage management, deal cards, and relationship linking. Connect contacts and companies to active opportunities.

changes.text: Deal pipeline with drag-and-drop stage management
Deal detail view with timeline, notes and linked contacts
Company and contact linking from deal context
CRM list view with inline filtering and sorting
Activity feed not updating after note creation

releases.title: Contacts & Companies
releases.description: Relationship intelligence foundation — full contact and company management with activity timelines and note capture.

changes.text: Contact detail view with activity timeline
Company profiles with contact association
Note capture on contacts, companies and deals
Global search across contacts, companies and deals
Workspace-scoped access control for all CRM data

releases.title: Workspace Foundation
releases.description: Multi-workspace architecture, workspace creation flow, invites, and the workspace operating shell.

changes.text: Multi-workspace support — create and switch between workspaces
Workspace creation wizard with logo upload
Team member invitations via email
Onboarding flow redesigned as a guided checklist
Session expiry not redirecting correctly on workspace pages

roadmap.headline: Where we're going.
roadmap.subline: A transparent view of what's being built, what's coming next, and the longer-term vision for Gunimi.
roadmap.disclaimer: Roadmap reflects current intentions and is subject to change. Priority and timing may shift based on product direction.

inProgress.title: Email integration
inProgress.description: Send and receive email inside Gunimi. Full thread view with AI-assisted replies.

inProgress.title: Relationship intelligence graph
inProgress.description: Visualise connections between contacts, companies and deals. Identify warm paths.

inProgress.title: AI meeting prep
inProgress.description: Automatic brief before any scheduled meeting. Surface relevant deals, notes and history.

inProgress.title: Task automation
inProgress.description: Trigger tasks from deal stage changes, contact activity or calendar events.

planned.title: Calendar integration
planned.description: Connect Google Calendar or Outlook. See meetings alongside contacts and deals.

planned.title: Mobile application
planned.description: iOS and Android apps with full offline support and push notifications.

planned.title: Custom fields
planned.description: Add workspace-specific fields to contacts, companies, deals and tasks.

planned.title: API & webhooks
planned.description: Public API with webhook support for integrating Gunimi into your existing stack.

planned.title: Advanced reporting
planned.description: Pipeline velocity, win rates, activity metrics and custom dashboards.

future.title: Autonomous agents
future.description: AI agents that take actions — scheduling, follow-ups, data enrichment — with your approval.

future.title: Revenue intelligence
future.description: Predictive deal scoring, churn risk signals and revenue forecasting.

future.title: Partner ecosystem
future.description: Native integrations with Hubspot, Salesforce, Stripe, Notion and more.

future.title: White-label workspaces
future.description: Agencies and consultancies can deploy Gunimi under their own brand for clients.

future.title: Gunimi Memory
future.description: Long-term persistent AI memory per workspace — context that builds over time.

press.headline: Press kit.
press.subline: Everything you need to write about Gunimi — company overview, brand assets, and media contact.
press.brandmarkBody: The AiCore orbital mark with the wordmark Gunimi in the same weight.
press.brandmarkMinSize: Minimum size: 24px height. Always on dark backgrounds.
press.companyBody: Gunimi is an AI-first Workspace Operating System that unifies relationship management, knowledge, communication and opportunity tracking inside a single intelligent platform. Built for modern teams that need context — not more software.
press.mediaContactDescription: For press enquiries, interview requests, or editorial collaboration.

brand.headline: The Gunimi identity.
brand.subline: How we look, speak and present ourselves. Use these guidelines to represent Gunimi consistently and professionally.
brand.logomarkBody: The AiCore orbital mark with the wordmark Gunimi in the same weight.
brand.logomarkMinSize: Minimum size: 24px height. Always on dark backgrounds.
brand.voiceDescription: Gunimi speaks like a senior operator: calm, direct, precise. Never hype. Never fluff.

typography.sample: Every deal. Every contact. One workspace.

voice.title: Precise, not verbose
voice.dont: "Powerful AI features designed to help businesses like yours succeed."

voice.title: Confident, not arrogant
voice.do: "Built for the way modern teams work."
voice.dont: "The best workspace platform in the world."

waitlist.subtitle: Your account has been received. Access is granted by invitation — we review every application personally.
waitlist.panelDescription: Most accounts are reviewed within 48 hours. When approved, you will receive an email with a direct link to activate your workspace.
waitlist.stillPending: Still reviewing. You'll receive an email when your access is confirmed.
waitlist.accessGranted: Access confirmed. Setting up your workspace...

today.healthHealthy: Your business is in good shape.
today.focusEmptyAction: Your business is in good shape.
today.focusEmptyReason: No immediate priority. All deals and relationships are active.
today.focusDealPastCloseAction: Update or close "{title}" — close date passed {days} days ago
today.focusDealPastCloseReason: Deals past their expected close date create pipeline uncertainty. Update the stage or mark as lost.
today.focusDealClosingReason: The close window is approaching. Consistent attention in the final week prevents last-minute surprises.
today.focusDealStaleReason: Deals that go quiet lose momentum. A brief update or follow-up keeps it moving.
today.focusContactStaleAction: Reach out to {name} — no contact in {days} days
today.focusContactStaleReason: An active deal depends on this relationship. Last contact was {days} days ago with {deal} pending.
today.focusContactOverdueTaskAction: Follow up with {name} — task overdue by {days} days
today.focusContactOverdueTaskReason: A commitment linked to this contact is past its due date.
today.focusCompanyClosingDealAction: Act on "{dealTitle}" — {days} days to close with {company}
today.focusCompanyClosingDealReason: A deal with this company is approaching its close window.
today.firstSignalMoment: Your workspace has found its first opportunity to help.
today.firstSignalEvaluating: Your workspace is still evaluating. Add more context and Gunimi will begin surfacing insights shortly.

awakening.heading: Your workspace is ready.
awakening.subheading: Now let's teach it about your business.
awakening.context: Gunimi learns from context. The more it knows about your business, the more intelligent its signals become.

company.title: Add your first company.
company.description: Give your workspace its first understanding of your business.

contact.title: Add your first relationship.
contact.description: Relationships become the foundation for future signals.

deal.title: Create your first opportunity.
deal.description: Once work begins, Gunimi can begin understanding it.

invite.errorNoLongerActive: This invite is no longer active.
invite.inviteDescription: You have been invited to collaborate inside the Gunimi workspace.
